gt_sql: SELECT `date` FROM ( SELECT t2.crossing, t2.`date` FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_fifa_api_id = t2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Kevin Constant' ORDER BY t2.crossing DESC) ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT pa.date
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
ORDER BY pa.crossing DESC
LIMIT 1
question: When was the first time did Kevin Constant have his highest crossing score? Give the date.
